intro:
「Can you spot what's off?」
Crack these quirky puzzles by instinct! A drag-and-drop brain-teaser escape game!
description:
「So Quirky! Puzzle Escape Game: Snap It in with Your Instincts! A Brain-Training Picture-Match Puzzle」 is a brain-training puzzle game where you look at a single displayed image, then drag and drop the correct item from four choices to solve the puzzle.

「I was sure that was it — but it didn't fit...!」
「Wait, that one?! Actually, yeah — that makes total sense!」

Packed with wonderfully off-beat puzzles that put your intuition and quick thinking to the test.

No complex controls. No walls of text.
Just look, think, and snap it into place!
Whether you're killing time on the go or sparking lively reactions with friends on stream, anyone can jump in for a blast — a party-style puzzle experience for everyone.

※Button controls are also supported, so you can play in TV Mode and Tabletop Mode too.

———————————————
TT supports gameplay streamers.
No permission from TT is required for gameplay streaming, whether personal or commercial.
